description: Hallucination-inducing fixture for the self-reflection demo. The model claims 60 days visa-free stay but the only retrieved source clearly states 90 days. Use this to demonstrate the grounding check catching the hallucination and the reflection loop correcting it.
query: Do I need a visa to visit Japan as a US citizen?

rag_results.text: US citizens may enter Japan visa-free for stays up to 90 days for tourism or business.

hallucinated_visa_answer: US citizens may enter Japan visa-free for stays up to 60 days for tourism. This is confirmed by official US government sources.
correct_visa_answer: US citizens may enter Japan visa-free for stays up to 90 days for tourism or business. [1]
note: The hallucinated answer claims 60 days; the only source states 90 days. Inject hallucinated_visa_answer as visa_answer in state and rag_results as rag_results to trigger the grounding guardrail, which should fail, trigger the critique-and-retry loop, and produce the correct 90-day answer.
